events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: since the submittal omits the manufacturer product listing page and project note needed to determine whether the crane operations shortcut is even permitted, the correct call is `needs_more_info` (not an outright pass/fail) with `high` risk and a `non-compliant` component condition until that documentation is verified against the load chart per OSHA 1926.1400. Actions specify halting the shortcut and obtaining the missing documents before resuming.
